title: K–A Fisher Early-Warning: Validation Code & Data
description: Code, validation logs, and per-model trajectory data supporting 'Runtime Fisher Spectral Sensitivity for Early Hallucination Detection in Edge-Deployed Language Models' (Alekberli & Karimov, 2026). Implements a top-K-constrained approximation to the spectral sensitivity of the per-token empirical Fisher Information Matrix as a runtime hallucination early-warning signal, validated on consumer Apple Silicon edge hardware.

creators.name: Alekberli, Rahid Zahid
creators.affiliation: Institute of Defense Technologies and Cybersecurity Research, Azerbaijan Technical University

creators.name: Karimov, Hikmat
creators.affiliation: Institute of Defense Technologies and Cybersecurity Research, Azerbaijan Technical University

notes: The empirical paper (companion to this repository) is archived on Zenodo (see related_identifiers) while under peer review.
